records.question: Which colleges located in St. Francis Xavier have a member named Tom Weiskopf?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT college.college_id FROM college
JOIN member ON college.college_id = member.college_id
WHERE college.college_location = 'St. Francis Xavier' AND member.name = 'Tom Weiskopf'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT college.College_ID
FROM college
INNER JOIN member ON college.College_ID = member.College_ID
WHERE college.College_Location = 'St. Francis Xavier'
  AND member.Name = 'Tom Weiskopf'
